title: Oscars 2026: Best Picture Winner Predictions & Odds | Polymarket
text: Polymarket is a decentralized prediction market platform where traders place real money on outcomes. For the 2026 Oscars Best Picture race, One Battle After Another was the clear favorite on Polymarket, at approximately 75 cents (representing about 75% probability). Over 30 million was traded on Best Picture alone on Polymarket as of mid-March 2026, surpassing the 5.3 million for the entirety of the best picture race in 2025. Between Polymarket and Kalshi, more than 100 million was traded on Oscar contracts overall. Polymarket has a one-month accuracy score of 94%, and prediction markets like Polymarket have a strong track record of accuracy, especially as events approach their resolution date. Polymarket odds are set by real traders putting real money behind their beliefs, and with millions traded on the market, these prices aggregate the collective knowledge and conviction of thousands of participants, often outperforming polls, expert forecasts, and traditional surveys. Users of both Polymarket and Kalshi did an excellent job predicting this year's Oscar nominees overall, though they made some notable misses in acting categories for supporting roles.
